plot_frame_box.description: Plot frame detected via dark-row/col scan; corroborated by tick-mark positions just outside the frame.

x_axis.value_storage_convention: Data x values stored as FRACTIONS in [0,1]. The image's tick labels are printed as percent strings ('0%', '20%', ... '100%') and were interpreted as percent / 100 before fitting.

y_axis.value_storage_convention: Data y values stored in REAL (cps) units after multiplying printed tick labels by 1e7. Offset label '1e7' was read just above the y-axis frame.

worked_example.scenario: Sixth marker at pixel (cx=323.9, cy=263.3) on the Throughput line.
worked_example.verification: Falls on the visible blue marker just past x=40% near y=0.36*1e7; matches the chart.

detection_internals.frame_detection_rule: Long dark rows/cols via threshold gray<120; corroborated by tick-mark scan in band just outside frame.
detection_internals.comment: Text-cluster centers shift slightly from tick positions because labels vary in character count (e.g., '0%' vs '100%'); calibration uses tick-mark positions, not text centers, for accuracy.
